admin_users_super_admin_role_check.name: admin_users_super_admin_role_check
admin_users_super_admin_role_check.value: NOT ("admin_users"."is_super_admin" = true AND "admin_users"."role_id" IS NOT NULL)

refresh_tokens_user_check.name: refresh_tokens_user_check
refresh_tokens_user_check.value: ("refresh_tokens"."customer_id" IS NOT NULL)::int + ("refresh_tokens"."admin_user_id" IS NOT NULL)::int = 1
